title: McIlroy is all alone through 36 holes; can anyone catch him?

title: Red-hot Rory sets Masters record with 6-shot lead

title: From a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
content: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

content: The warning came in response to a question on if Washington has a Plan B ready in case the US-Iran negotiations collapse or Tehran refuses to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Watch: PM Modi, Rahul engage in candid talks during Jyotiba Phule tribute ceremony
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi shared a brief, candid conversation at a Parliament tribute ceremony for Mahatma Jyotiba Phule. The interaction drew attention given their history of sharp political exchanges and public criticisms of each other. Both leaders separately paid homage to the social reformer's legacy.

title: 10 dead in Mathura boat tragedy: From bhajans to screams of terror in a split second; watch
content: A Vrindavan boat tragedy has left at least 10 devotees from Ludhiana dead, with five still missing after their boat capsized in the Yamuna. Survivors recount a terrifying ordeal, singing bhajans moments before the accident. Rescue operations are ongoing, and helplines have been established to assist affected families.

title: 'Kal se khel sakte hain?': What Sooryavanshi asked doctors after being hit on helmet
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, at 15, is taking the world’s best bowlers to the cleaners. After taking on Mumbai Indians' Jasprit Bumrah a few days ago, he tore apart Royal Challengers Bengaluru seamers Josh Hazlewood and Bhuvneshwar Kumar as well. Sooryavanshi does not bother with reputations or resumes. The youngster bats with rare clarity and shows intent from ball one, and his personal side-arm thrower back in Tajpur, Samastipur, is not surprised at all.

title: Artemis II crew's 10-day trip around Earth & Moon — timeline of Nasa’s historic lunar mission
content: Artemis II successfully concluded with a safe splashdown, marking humanity's first crewed lunar journey in decades. The four astronauts travelled further than ever before, testing vital systems and paving the way for future Moon landings and Mars missions. This historic flight included the first woman, first Black astronaut, and first non-American on a lunar voyage.

title: FBI recovers deleted Signal chats, says report; check how to secure messages
content: The FBI reportedly accessed deleted Signal messages from an iPhone by tapping into the device's notification database. Even after the app was removed, incoming message content was found stored, raising privacy concerns for secure messaging apps. While outgoing messages remained inaccessible, this discovery highlights a potential vulnerability in how notification previews are handled on iPhones.

title: 'IPL is lot more of a movie than actual cricket': PSL batter's bizzare comparison
content: Rossouw is part of the Quetta Gladiators in the ongoing PSL 2026. "Both leagues (IPL and PSL) have their pros and cons. IPL is a very long tournament, and Pakistan (Super League) is a much more compact tournament where the competition is a lot more fierce," the left-handed batter said.

title: ED raids premises of ex-Bengal minister Partha Chatterjee, middleman
content: Fresh searches were conducted by the Enforcement Directorate at two Kolkata locations, including the residence of former West Bengal minister Partha Chatterjee, as part of a money laundering probe into the teachers' recruitment scam. Chatterjee, previously arrested in a similar case, failed to appear for questioning. The ED is investigating multiple recruitment irregularities linked to him.

title: Pune techie gets 25 years in jail for repeatedly raping niece over 3 years
content: An application development team leader from a prominent IT company in Pune has been sentenced to 25 years of rigorous imprisonment for repeatedly raping his 12-year-old niece over three years. The conviction, based on video evidence, the survivor's testimony, and medical reports, highlighted the heinous nature of the crime.

title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection: Ranveer Singh starrer inches towards Rs 1100cr
content: The buzz around Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' shows no signs of waning, as it approaches the astounding mark of Rs 1100 crore within just 24 days. This espionage thriller has set a new benchmark in the industry, being the first Bollywood film to achieve the Rs 1000 crore milestone in India. Read the full article to know more in detail.

title: India Real Estate attracts $1.2 billion in private equity; what it means for buyers, investors
content: India's real estate sector experienced a robust start to 2026, with private equity investment soaring to USD 1.2 billion in Q1, a 66% year-on-year increase. Office assets dominated, attracting 41% of investments, primarily in Gurugram and Pune. Domestic investors led the charge, signaling renewed confidence despite global economic uncertainties.

title: Meta to 'selected' engineers: Joining the new Applied AI Engineering unit is 'no longer optional'
content: Meta is now mandating top software engineers join its new Applied AI Engineering unit, abandoning voluntary sign-ups. This unit aims to develop AI agents capable of handling significant engineering tasks, reflecting a company-wide push towards AI integration.  These compulsory transfers signal a major internal restructuring as Meta prioritizes AI development.

title: 100% road tax waiver for electric cars & more - what Delhi govt's draft EV policy says
content: Delhi's draft EV Policy 2026-2030 aims to combat air pollution by accelerating electric vehicle adoption. Key features include tax exemptions for affordable EVs, mandatory electrification of three-wheelers and government fleets, and expansion of charging infrastructure. The policy seeks to build a supportive ecosystem for clean mobility.

title: West Bengal elections: Owaisi dumps Kabir after sting video on 'Rs 1k crore BJP deal'
content: AIMIM has ended its electoral alliance with Humayun Kabir's AUJP following a sting video allegedly showing Kabir discussing a Rs 1,000-crore deal with BJP and suggesting Muslim voters be misled. AIMIM stated it cannot associate with statements questioning the integrity of Bengal's Muslims and will now contest independently.

title: 'No money available': Trump's peace board faces cash crunch, Gaza plan stalls amid Iran war
content: Trump's Board of Peace has received only a fraction of the $17 billion pledged for rebuilding Gaza, preventing plans for the war-hit region's future, This funding crisis has halted plans for a US-backed Palestinian technocratic body to govern Gaza, leaving its deployment stalled due to a lack of available funds and ongoing security concerns.

title: 'My companions': Iran marks Pak trip with tribute to Minab school strike victims
content: Iranian officials placed images of children killed in the Minab incident on seats during a flight to Islamabad for peace talks. The delegation, led by Parliament Speaker Qalibaf, aims to stabilize a regional ceasefire amid ongoing violence and Iranian skepticism about negotiations. The talks address sanctions relief and regional security, with Iran blaming the US for the Minab school strike.

title: Caught on cam: UP lawyer shot dead during morning walk in Mirzapur
content: A lawyer, Rajeev Singh, was shot dead during his morning walk in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh, on Friday. The assailants, who had a prior village dispute with the victim, attempted to flee on a motorcycle but were briefly delayed. They escaped after one threatened bystanders with a pistol.

title: Is China preparing to supply weapons to Iran? US intelligence raises concerns
content: US intelligence suggests China is preparing to deliver new air defense systems, including MANPADS, to Iran within weeks. This comes as China claims to have supported a ceasefire, ahead of President Trump's visit to China. Beijing denies supplying weapons, stating it upholds international obligations.

title: 'Dear Vaibhav...' : Virat Kohli’s heartwarming message for Sooryavanshi
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 78 off 26 balls powered Rajasthan Royals to a stunning chase against RCB in Guwahati. His innings, featuring 8 fours and 7 sixes, secured the Orange Cap and a memorable win. Virat Kohli also gifted the young prodigy an autographed cap with a congratulatory message.

title: Watch: Dramatic splashdown as Nasa astronauts return after historic journey around Moon
content: The Artemis II crew has successfully returned to Earth, splashing down in the Pacific Ocean after a historic nearly 10-day lunar flyby. Commander Reid Wiseman, pilot Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen re-entered the atmosphere at Mach 33, with their Orion spacecraft Integrity making a parachute-assisted landing.

title: White lotus effect: What travel 'vibe checks' reveal about relationship compatibility
content: Holidays are the ultimate relationship test, revealing compatibility as couples navigate stress, money and expectations without daily routines. Relationship expert highlights five red flags: constant complaining, controlling behaviour, inflexibility, emotional withdrawal and blaming. These vacation dynamics expose deeper issues, urging couples to pay attention to these patterns for a healthier future.

title: ‘Great!’ Trump reacts as 'wave of empty tankers' head for American oil
content: President Trump reacted positively to a social media post indicating a surge of empty tankers heading to the U.S. to collect crude oil. This follows his assertion that the Strait of Hormuz will be opened, with or without Iran, ahead of high-level talks in Pakistan. Trump also stated the U.S.

title: Nobody warns you about this: An Australian tourist shows India beyond the stereotypes
content: First-time visitors to India often perceive a country defined by traffic, cows, and vibrant chaos. However, this visual language fails to capture the full reality. Beyond traditional portrayals of poverty and religion, India is experiencing significant growth in infrastructure, business, and modern urban life, challenging preconceptions of progress and tradition existing separately.

title: TSBIE results 2026: TS Inter 1st and 2nd year scores to be released tomorrow - check details
content: Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) will declare TS Inter Results 2026 for 1st and 2nd year on April 12 for nearly 9.97 lakh students. Exams were held between Feb 25 and March 18 across the state. Students can check results online using hall ticket numbers on official websites. The marks memo will be provisional. Passing requires 35 percent. Revaluation and supplementary options will be available after results, along with grading details and statistics.

title: Macabre twist in Ahmedabad ‘dosa’ deaths: Couple may have killed daughters over desire for son
content: Investigation into the deaths of two young sisters, Raha and Mishri Prajapati, has shifted from accidental poisoning to suspected murder. Police are exploring the motive that the parents desired a son, with the mother's diary revealing her wish for a male child.

title: 2cr voters deleted, 13.4cr in UP’s final poll roll
content: Uttar Pradesh removed over 2 crore voters during a 166-day special intensive revision, bringing the final electoral roll to approximately 13.39 crore. Despite significant deletions, the state saw a net increase of 84 lakh voters, with improved gender ratio and substantial additions in the 18-19 age group.

title: Mukul Choudhary: 36 sixes in an innings and an MS Dhoni dream
content: Mukul Choudhary’s 27-ball 57 at Eden Gardens was years in the making - from 500-km bus rides across Rajasthan to practicing on red-soil and once smashing 36 sixes in an innings. Inspired by MS Dhoni, the 21-year-old is making a mark with his hitting ability and team-first mindset.

title: ‘Decimated’ but not defeated: Iran still holds thousands of missiles, US intel warns
content: Iran still possesses thousands of ballistic missiles and can rebuild its arsenal. US intelligence indicates many launchers were damaged but are recoverable. While drone stocks are depleted, cruise missiles remain. US officials claim significant degradation of Iran's capabilities. Analysts caution that even reduced capacity allows Iran to remain a dominant regional power.

title: 4 men barge in, kill Karnataka Youth Cong leader Fairoz Pathan inside his home
content: Tragedy struck Dharwad late Friday night as Youth Congress leader Fairoz Pathan was brutally murdered at his Hashminagar residence. Unidentified assailants reportedly forced their way into his home and attacked him with lethal weapons before escaping. CCTV footage is expected to be vital in identifying the perpetrators as police launch a manhunt.

title: Bumrah or Hazlewood, doesn't matter: Sooryavanshi says 'play the ball, not bowler'
content: Sooryavanshi scored 78 off 26 balls as Rajasthan Royals (RR) chased down Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s (RCB) total of 201 with two overs remaining.

title: India-UAE comprehensive strategic partnership: Jaishankar arrives in Abu Dhabi
content: EAM S Jaishankar arrived in the UAE for high-level meetings to strengthen the Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, following his visit to Mauritius. Discussions in Mauritius focused on energy cooperation, including oil and gas supply agreements and clean energy projects, reinforcing the need for dependable strategic partnerships amidst regional crises.

title: 'Docs said I'll never walk': How this woman reversed her health with Indian food
content: Pallavi Kumar Aggarwal, now Mira, overcame a severe knee injury that doctors said would prevent her from walking or running again. She embraced veganism, Kriya Yoga, and Ayurveda, transforming her health and life. Mira went on to complete the Ladakh Marathon and trek to Everest Base Camp.

title: Drama in PSL over Usman Tariq's action: Batter walks away vs Pak spinner - Watch
content: The New Zealand batter raised concerns about the long pause in Tariq’s action before release. Mitchell walked away twice during the over, before the umpires stepped in to allow play to continue.

title: US troops recall chaos after deadly Iranian drone strike on Kuwait base
content: Survivors of a deadly drone strike in Kuwait have challenged the Pentagon's narrative, stating their unit was unprepared and lacked fortified defenses. The attack, which killed six service members and injured over 20, occurred at a lightly protected facility. Soldiers described the chaos and their efforts to save lives amidst the destruction.

title: Watch: Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad for high-stakes talks with US
content: A high-level Iranian delegation arrived in Islamabad for crucial peace talks with the US, aiming to stabilize a fragile Middle East ceasefire. Iran has set preconditions, including asset release and a Lebanon ceasefire, while expressing distrust of Washington. The US warns against "bad faith" negotiations, seeking to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and curb Iran's nuclear program.

title: After India's Shanti Bill, Gor says US ready to cooperate on civil nuclear, LPG exports
content: India and the US are deepening their strategic partnership, with Ambassador Gor highlighting significant growth in defense cooperation, including boosted sales and interoperability.  Following India's SHANTI Bill, civil nuclear energy collaboration is set to expand, alongside opportunities in coal gasification and LPG exports. High-level meetings in Washington underscored a shared commitment to strengthening security and trade across multiple sectors.

title: Missing Kerala girl found dead near Chikkamagaluru waterfall
content: A missing teenage girl from Kerala was tragically found deceased near a waterfall in Chikkamagaluru's Manikyadhara Hills. Rescuers located her body deep within a gorge using a drone. While authorities suggest a possible fall, her distraught parents suspect foul play, claiming she was kidnapped and drugged. The post-mortem will determine the exact cause of death.

title: Bhagyalakshmi on director Ranjith arrest, says she called the survivor immediately
content: Dubbing artist Bhagyalakshmi has voiced her unwavering support for survivors in the sexual assault case involving director Ranjith Balakrishnan, who was granted bail with conditions.  She revealed her decision to cease TV debates, prioritizing direct support for victims over public pronouncements. Bhagyalakshmi emphasized her commitment to standing with women facing harassment, regardless of the accused's identity.

title: Youth slits 16-year-old girl’s throat for rejecting marriage proposal in Andhra Pradesh
content: A 19-year-old man allegedly murdered a 16-year-old girl by slitting her throat after she refused his marriage proposal. The accused, Venkatesh, was arrested by police shortly after the incident. The girl's family and women's groups are protesting, demanding justice and severe punishment.

title: Fuel for thought: India boosts domestic LPG output to 60%
content: India's domestic LPG production now covers nearly 60% of national demand, easing concerns amid Middle East conflict. Authorities are boosting PNG connections, with over 4 lakh consumers switching recently. Commercial LPG supplies have recovered, and priority is given to essential services. Smaller 5kg LPG cylinders are now more accessible, with supply doubled and documentation simplified.

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiles for more than 30 tight ends
content: Mike Clay is revealing his fantasy football rookie rankings at each key offensive position . the rankings do not include rookies because we are unsure of their landing spots . he trails only Ja'Marr Chase in targets (317) and receptions (2,385) .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: Spring game previews: Alabama, Florida among ones to note Saturday
content: nine power 4 schools hold an event on saturday, April 11 . it's spring game season in the world of college football with four games . a quarterback battle at Alabama between Austin Mack and Keelon Russell .

content: Frank Leboeuf believes Bayern Munich's "sloppiness" allowed real madrid back into the game . it's difficult to take this stance when snide comments about the supposed weakness of the Bundesliga are made by international pundits who frankly should know a lot better .

title: Senator contacts leagues over 'gambling's ugly takeover'
content: senator sends letters to six league commissioners raising concerns about "gambling's ugly takeover of sports" he asks the leagues to provide information by may 1 about their partnerships with both sportsbooks and prediction markets . he says the growing prediction market space has "only made the problem wow"

title: The NBA's most valuable players in 15 categories, from floaters to defense
content: there have been almost 60,000 minutes of basketball played in this NBA season . that's 40-plus days straight of no sleep . the numbers are going to tell stories about what players are good at in different areas of the game .

title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
content: the federal government has opened a probe into whether the NFL is harming consumers in the way it sells its broadcast rights . a growing chorus of lawmakers and fans have expressed concern over the NFL and other leagues putting more games on subscription streaming services, leading to potentially increased costs for viewers . the probe is unclear, but the NFL has a limited antitrust exemption as part of the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 .
